name: onframe
description: Extensao local para editar fotos de anuncios do Mercado Livre pela pagina do produto.

scripts.release:check: npm run version:check && npm run test:all && npm run package:release
scripts.test:all: node --test test/commerce.test.js test/extension.test.js test/items.test.js test/photos.test.js test/service.test.js
